title: EQ - Reset EQ and Save EQ becomes active only after moving slider
scenario: Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons remain disabled until a slider is moved in Custom EQ settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the connected Poly audio device to open Device Settings.
Observe the 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons at the bottom of the Custom EQ screen.
Without moving any slider, check the state of the 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons.
expected: The 'Reset EQ' and 'Save EQ' buttons should be disabled (greyed out) until the user moves any slider in the Custom EQ settings. After a slider adjustment is made, both buttons should become active (enabled).
